# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

```ruby
namespace :backup do
  desc 'Backup creation'
  
  task :create, [:name, :path] => [:environment] do |t, args|
    if !args.errors? # check for errors in arguments and stop execution of the script on error (optional)
      name = "#{args[:name]}.tar.gz"
      `tar -czf /backups/#{name} --absolute-path=#{args[:path]} .[!.]* 2>&1 | grep '^[0-9]\+' & echo $
